screen_metadata.name: Corporate Machinery Registry & Maintenance Work-Order Control Vault

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px high-density machinery layout framework)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Three-Pane Operational Vault Layout (Left Section Panel: Filterable interactive factory equipment folders tree grouping structural hardware arrays; Center Main Canvas Workspace: High-density interactive Maintenance Work-Order (WO) ledger grid sheet; Right Contextual Sidebar Drawer: Real-time telemetry gauge meters, failure mode classifications codes trees, and custom repair assignment routing bars)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains parallel tracking equipment rosters and active repair logs worksheets side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The left equipment list fold-collapses into a sliding container left panel drawer tracks to optimize data row text spacing fields inside spreadsheets)

key_visible_sections.title: Real-Time Telemetry Monitor & Failure Mode Center

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active plant maintenance engineer or shop-floor supervisor access keys -> Inherit multi-tenant asset scopes profiles -> Execute state request payload fetch from AssetManagementService.getEquipmentRegistry()
user_progression_routes.on_machinery_row_select: Asynchronously query internal telemetries logs streams via background hooks pipelines to re-hydrate real-time vibration charts and thermal thresholds data frames

redirection_rules.condition: If an active hardware asset registers a critical engineering failure state token flag (e.g., machinery temperature sensor thresholds overflow safety parameters bounds)
redirection_rules.action: Force intercept order movement steps, transition card visual layout wraps instantly into a flashing crimson context border, toggle machine operational status tags inline to 'CRITICAL BREAKDOWN', and auto-emit an immediate cluster wide blocking signal to the MFG production queue

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes system action control command header selector link button 'btn_trigger_emergency_breakdown'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center dialog validation overlay forcing multi-tier field inputs capturing specific down-time failure classification code keys, operator assignment identifiers rows, and material repair replacement parts selection dropdown loops matching PLM data master structures

atoms.type: Signed Whole Integer Form Input Control Component Box
Functional Core Action Core Button Element

molecules.composition: Combines equipment tracking hardware icon + un-duplicated serial code mapping tag (e.g., eam_mach_robot_8841) + localized floor zone title label + conditional status pill indicator token element

Combines monospaced work order identification sequence number + repair priority type tag indicator (`PREVENTATIVE` / `CORRECTIVE_REACTIVE`) + assigned engineering team metadata string + estimated repair time duration cell + inline execution action checkboxes keys loops

organisms.composition: High-density recursive list tree layout streaming connected hardware infrastructure metrics registries, managing multi-tier searching filtering scripts parameters instantly.

High-performance virtual scrolling spreadsheet grid canvas nesting rows item elements instances of maintenance_workorder_ledger_row molecules structures, complete with multi-tier sorting functions header controls.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Precision monospaced formatting styles stack applied strictly across equipment keys tags, failure codes, sensor thresholds, and repair timers to lock grid rows structural layouts alignments perfectly)

scales.machinery_title_emphasis: font-size: 1.25rem (20px) | font-weight: 700 | tracking: tight text-transform regular
scales.telemetry_digits_mono_alignment: font-size: 0.8125rem (13px) | font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace | font-weight: 600 | color: slate-gray-bright

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.asset_nominal_teal: #10B981 (Emerald Green Asset Operational Cleared Anchor Focus Hue Accent)
color_palette_hex.asset_crash_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Critical Equipment Failure Mismatch Boundary Alert Glow Fill)
color_palette_hex.telemetry_gauge_slate: #111827 (Charcoal Dark Interface Operations Console Box Background Panel Fill)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard system-wide section partition boundary padding unit metrics parameters fields)
spacing_and_borders.ledger_row_height_density: 2.375rem (38px high-density vertical row parameters layout cell bounds)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Component Framework Partition Separators Layout Line)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: background-color properties transform settings focus pointer map value to #334155 using an immediate 80ms execution curves duration curve time parameter
background-color properties transition shift to #DC2626; transform visual scaling parameters to translateY(-1px) to project critical haptic look feedback context responses

accessibility_aria_roles.maintenance_work_orders_calculating_spre: role='grid' housing multi-column extensive historical industrial repair task registries database matrices spreadsheets layers
accessibility_aria_roles.machinery_telemetry_drawer_inspector: role='region' accompanied by explicit aria-live='assertive' configuration fields monitoring real-time sensor streams modifications metrics parameters fields

equipment_machinery_roster_dataset.description: Heavy Duty Robotic Precision Assembler Array (Line 04 Facility Bundle)

historical_maintenance_work_orders.summary_notes: Robotic arm positioning motor axis locked down following rapid thermal threshold ceiling bounds breach. Emitted downstream execution blocking signals to shift MFG work order routings.

local_reactive_state_variables.active_machinery_row_pointer_id: Tracks currently focused hardware asset directory row database identifier key string lookup fields maps tokens (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_emergency_wizard_visible: Boolean state variable tracking presentation configurations parameters toggling alternative multi-step authorization emergency repair dispatch worksheet fields overlays
local_reactive_state_variables.machinery_ledger_text_search_query: String variable tracking character search queries running text matching filters across work order numbers data cells arrays rows instantly

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application instance session multi-tenant company context parameters tracking codes configurations cross microservice runtime execution scopes
global_application_context_bindings.plm_material_master_shared_buffer: Global storage context data cache allocating versioned hardware blueprints, component spare parts lists parameters, and tooling records definitions locally to prevent repeated network request delays during parts replacement mappings

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous module scripts executing zero compiler dependencies scripts or heavy external tracking modifications filters packages layers
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Hydration timelines mapping complex stream data tracking charts inside machinery_telemetry_drawer_inspector panels layout components following equipment row switches must finalize browser grid modifications updates cycles under a target execution limit parameter of 11ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind fetched historical work orders lines data records direct mapping fields arrays into local maintenance_work_orders_calculating_spreadsheet view collection stores, and apply lookup keys values forward into active_machinery_row_pointer_id

Flip state tracking variable flag configuration is_emergency_wizard_visible parameter modifier value to true to launch global emergency breakdown allocation worksheet overlays dialogue frames instantly

Publish secure infrastructure state transition data command packets outward to system asynchronous message broker streams; overwrite matching row properties indices keys values inside local equipment_machinery_roster_dataset view models indicators tracking attributes to `CRITICAL_BREAKDOWN` instantly; turn off wizard overlays layer flags

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /asset-management/scheduler (Advances browser web layout router framework spatial navigation coordinates parameters forward into final sequence Screen EAM_SCR_002 Preventative Maintenance Scheduler & Machine Downtime Log Viewport Frame)
